text: A crust? A copper? The big streets pretend they don't see us, but Secundus has hollow places where even the guards look away.
speaker: Beggar Child

text: Sometimes an apprentice drops bread like it's a spell component—like pity fixes anything. I'd rather hear a real story than a sermon.
speaker: Beggar Child

text: They say Veneficturis lights up at night like a second sky. I would trade a week of meals just to see that fire once.
speaker: Beggar Child
